franchise_allfranchisemembersinpark: All Franchise members are already in the park
franchise_authenticationservererror_desc: An error occurred with the Authentication server. Please try again later.
franchise_collaborative_autosavedetected: There is an autosave for this park that's more recent than your last manual save. Which file would you like to load?
franchise_editendfranchisedeleted_desc: Another player has closed the franchise. Any changes you made since the last upload have not been saved.
franchise_editendparkdeleted_desc: Another player has deleted this park. Any changes you made since the last upload have not been saved.
franchise_fanfare_establishmentcriteriam: This park has now met the requirements to participate in the leaderboards! Once you upload and exit, you can submit this park to the leaderboards at any time. Use this park to compete against other franchises and gain awards. Congratulations!
franchise_franchiseservererror_desc: An error occurred with the Franchise Mode server. You have been disconnected from online play, please try again later.
franchise_leaderboardtrophy_multiple_des: Wow, you won {Value:Int} trophies! The highest trophy you earned was {TrophyColour}. Check your player profile to see your awards!
franchise_leaderboardtrophy_single_desc: Congratulations, you won a trophy! Enjoy some awards too - you earned them!
franchise_lockrevoked_desc: Another player has ended your Editing Lock early. Any changes you made since the last upload have not been saved.
franchise_parkcollaborationservererror_d: An error occurred with the Park Collaboration server. Please try again later.
franchise_profanityfilterfailed_desc: Your Park name has been flagged by the profanity filter and cannot be opened for Collaboration. Please rename the Park and try again.
franchise_search_noresultsfound_desc: Tips to improve search results: - Check the tags that are being filtered. A tag might be hiding the result you're looking for - If searching for a Franchise name, try double checking your search's spelling - If searching by code, check that it's following the correct format: AAAA-BBBB-CCCC
franchise_setting_balanced: Average starting resources and regular guest behaviour balances management demands with potential profits.
franchise_setting_highriskhighreward: Minimal starting resources and demanding guests make this a real challenge, but the heights of success have never been higher.
franchise_setting_rapidexpansion: Lots of starting resources allows for rapid expansion, and guests will be easy to please but will never turn up in high numbers.
franchise_setting_shopmaniac: Above average starting resources and lots of guests whose stomachs can never be filled, but they won't spend much on rides!
franchise_socialservererror_desc: An error occurred with the Social Server. Please try again later.
franchise_trophy_bronze_desc: A beautiful Bronze Trophy earned from a challenge on the weekly Franchise leaderboard.
franchise_trophy_gold_desc: A glimmering Gold Trophy earned by being one of the top entrants for a challenge on the weekly Franchise leaderboard.
franchise_trophy_platinum_desc: A pristine Platinum Trophy for reaching the highest bracket for a challenge on the weekly Franchise leaderboard.
franchise_trophy_silver_desc: A shiny Silver Trophy earned by being a high scorer for a challenge on the weekly Franchise leaderboard.
franchise_unavailableformaintenance_desc: The server is currently unavailable due to maintenance. Please try again later.
franchise_youareoffline_desc: You are currently offline. Some features will be inaccessible until you regain an online connection.
